model_policy: Use gpt-5.5 with medium reasoning effort for every thread.

isolation.baseline: Detached worktree at a3ff543 with only the repository skill directory moved outside .agents/skills.
isolation.candidate: Detached worktree at a3ff543 with only SKILL.md replaced by the isolated candidate.
isolation.history: Fresh project thread per run. Prompts contain only the task and paired fixture path.

limitations: One run per condition is corrective smoke evidence, not an MVP threshold result.

case_prompts.E04: 项目需要建立一个经验库。请读取指定工作区的 context.md，比较适用方案，给出专业建议和分阶段选择。当前只做只读分析，不修改文件。
case_prompts.E06: 请读取指定工作区的 context.md，规划并推进当前能安全完成的只读分析。遇到需要我决定的高影响事项再询问；不要修改文件。
case_prompts.E36: 请读取指定工作区的 context.md，核查所依赖技术的公开一手资料，分别分析三个只读问题并给出方案。不要修改文件，涉及需要我决定的事项再询问。
